summary: Phase F — AI drafting (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key) validated end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 PASS on /app/backend/tests/test_phoneme_phase_f.py covering (1) POST /api/admin/phonemes/u-foot/ai-draft with fields:['mnemonic','funFact'] returns 200 with drafts.mnemonic{phrase,confidence float 0-1}, drafts.funFact{headline,body,confidence float 0-1}, model=='anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', dialect='GenAm', ipa='ʊ', status='bozza', session_id startswith 'phoneme-draft-', generated_at ISO parseable; (2) POST i-fleece with fields:['mnemonic'] returns ONLY mnemonic draft (no funFact key), ipa='iː'; (3) POST u-foot with fields:['funFact'] returns ONLY funFact; (4) invalid field → 400 with detail mentioning mnemonic/funFact; (5) empty fields[] → 400; (6) dialect:'Italian' → 400; (7) nonexistent-id → 404 with 'non trovato'; (8) no Authorization header → 403; (9) preview-only guarantee: GET /api/phonemes/{u-foot,i-fleece} returns same mnemonic/funFact as before draft calls (no persistence leak); (10) regression: canonical still 84 items, u-foot public frequencyChart still populated, u-foot /readiness still 100/100 ready=true, autofill /ʊ/ GenAm still works. Frontend: 9/9 spec checks PASS end-to-end on /admin/phonemes/i-fleece — section 'AI drafting · Claude Sonnet 4.5' expands on header click, editor-aidraft-toggle-mnemonic/toggle-funFact/request-btn visible, click request-btn (~10s LLM call) opens editor-aidraft-preview with editor-aidraft-mnemonic + editor-aidraft-funFact blocks each carrying a CONFIDENCE pill (visible via lowercase textContent 'confidence' + CSS uppercase), cancel-btn hides preview WITHOUT mutating editor-field-mnemonic-phrase (verified equal to API-fetched original 'He sees three sheep eat green leaves easily.'), apply-btn hides preview AND mutates editor-field-mnemonic-phrase (became 'Steve believes Queen Jean needs tea each week.') + editor-funFact-headline (became 'Longest vowel in English') + toast 'Bozza AI applicata' shown; navigation-away-without-save confirms GET /api/phonemes/i-fleece returns UNCHANGED mnemonic ('He sees three sheep...') — persistence-only-on-save guarantee holds; /admin/phonemes/new → editor-aidraft-request-btn is disabled (isNew guard); toggling both switches OFF then clicking request-btn shows editor-aidraft-error with 'Seleziona almeno un campo da generare.'
critical_code_review_comments: phoneme_cards.py generate_ai_draft() catches LLM SDK exception generically (`except Exception`) then bubbles as HTTP 502 with underlying error message — this can leak internal stack details (api key excerpts, model IDs) to the admin UI. Suggest sanitising to a fixed message like 'Errore chiamata LLM (vedi log server).' and logging the full traceback via logging.exception (already done). Not blocking, but tightens the surface.

phoneme_cards.py _AI_DRAFT_SYSTEM prompt is entirely in English while the rest of the admin UX and error strings are in Italian. Since the drafts themselves must be English pedagogical content (correct), leaving the system prompt in English is fine — flagging only for consistency awareness.

phoneme_cards.py _parse_llm_json() extracts the first {...} balanced block. If the LLM ever emits a JSON with a nested `{` inside a string containing an unescaped brace (unlikely with Claude 4.5), the balanced-depth counter would miscount because it doesn't track string-state. Consider using a proper JSON stream parser or json.JSONDecoder().raw_decode() from the first `{`. Not blocking — Claude Sonnet 4.5 has never emitted such a pathological payload in this test run.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx applyAiDraft() overwrites card.mnemonic.phrase/highlights/note but PRESERVES existing card.mnemonic.audio (via spread of prev.mnemonic) — this is correct and preserves manually-recorded audio URLs. Same for funFact. Good separation. Worth adding a unit-test-level assertion that untouched sibling fields (like mnemonic.audio) are preserved — currently only functionally verified by the persistence-guarantee test.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx state aiDraftFields defaults to {mnemonic:true, funFact:true}. On subsequent calls after apply, the switches remain ON, which is nice (fast re-generate). But the aiDraftPreview is not persisted across a save+reload — expected for preview-only, no comment needed.

Toast text 'Bozza AI applicata' is set via setToast+setTimeout(4500ms). If another action fires setToast in the meantime, this one silently vanishes. Would be cleaner to use a toast library (shadcn/sonner) with a stack, but current pattern is consistent with existing setToast usage on save/etc.

Regression: i-fleece Rounding='Unrounded (spread)' issue flagged in iteration_18 is now FIXED — /admin/phonemes/i-fleece/readiness returns 100/100 ready=true (verified during frontend test setup; screenshot shows all 15 checks green including parity.rounding).
seed_data_creation: None. No data was written to MongoDB by these tests. AI draft endpoint is preview-only — verified via GET-after-POST equality check for both u-foot and i-fleece (mnemonic + funFact unchanged). Frontend apply-test explicitly navigated away without clicking Save, and post-navigation GET /api/phonemes/i-fleece confirmed the original mnemonic 'He sees three sheep eat green leaves easily.' still on disk.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F is stable. Full phoneme CMS regression suite now: canonical(27) + phase_b(14) + phase_c(8) + phase_d(16) + phase_e(10) + phase_f(14) = 89 tests. Claude Sonnet 4.5 LLM latency observed: ~5-12s per call (3 successful calls during backend suite, 2 during frontend suite, no retries needed). If any future test flakes on LLM latency, increase LLM_TIMEOUT beyond 45s. Note: the /new isNew guard uses `isNew || aiDraftLoading` — correctly disables during in-flight calls too. i-fleece seed drift from iteration_18 ('Unrounded (spread)') has been fixed — readiness now returns 100/100 for i-fleece.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 23 total test cases (14 backend + 9 frontend) passed on first execution. Notable positive findings: (a) LLM guardrails hold — Claude Sonnet 4.5 returned strict JSON matching the requested shape on every call; (b) confidence floats always fell in [0,1]; (c) session_ids were unique per call ('phoneme-draft-ʊ-<8hex>' pattern verified); (d) preview-only invariant verified both server-side (GET-after-POST equality) and client-side (navigate-away-then-GET-verify). The only latent design observation is that generate_ai_draft() bubbles raw LLM SDK exception strings via HTTP 502 detail — could leak internal info in a production auth-bypass scenario, but this endpoint is admin-only so risk is low.
